control.activity.description.blocked: Automatic organization becomes available after activity recording is enabled.
control.activity.description.enabled: Classify and summarize scattered activity, then turn it into long-term memory.
control.activity.title: Automatic Organization
control.audio.description.blocked: Meetings and audio become available after activity recording is enabled.
control.audio.description.enabled: Capture meeting audio and transcribe it into meeting clues when models are available.
control.audio.title: Meetings & Audio
control.capture.description.blocked: Choose a model for organizing memory before enabling recording.
control.capture.description.enabled: Cradle will continuously organize your activity clues on this device.
control.capture.title: Record Activity
control.description: Decide whether Cradle records activity and how it organizes records into memory.
control.dream.description.blocked: Memory maintenance becomes available after activity recording is enabled.
control.dream.description.enabled: Periodically preview similar knowledge and merge automatically only when explicitly allowed.
control.dream.title: Memory Maintenance
control.model.description: This model understands activity, generates summaries, and distills memory.
control.model.title: Organization Model
control.reason.selectModelAndEnableCaptu: Choose an organization model, then enable activity recording
control.title: Start Recording
dependencyNotice.description: Automatic organization and meetings/audio depend on Record Activity. Enable activity recording first, then these controls become available.
dependencyNotice.title: Some switches will stay unavailable for now
knowledge.description: When Cradle believes an activity is worth retaining, it organizes it into decisions, tasks, insights, or patterns.
knowledge.title: Distilled Knowledge
memorySearch.description: Search organized activity memories to recover recent work, discussions, and related context.
memorySearch.title: Search Memory
memorySection.description: Search organized memories and review distilled knowledge cards.

page.description: Record your work context and organize it into searchable memory.
page.title: Chronicle

recentActivity.description: See the screens, messages, or audio clues Cradle recently observed, and confirm what context it is understanding.

resources.defaultMessage: The recording service provides the current status for this local capability.
setup.loadingModels.description: Chronicle needs a model to understand activity and generate memory. Once models finish loading, choose an organization model.

setup.missingProvider.title: Chronicle cannot be enabled yet
